overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a gothic-style divination classroom from a video game, featuring students seated at round tables with crystal balls, purple draped windows, and mystical tapestries. A character in light robes walks across the room from left to right while others remain seated in contemplation.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic divination classroom with stone walls and purple-draped windows. Several students sit on cushions around tables with glowing crystal balls. A character in light-colored robes enters from the left at 8 seconds, walks across the room past the seated students, and exits toward the right side by 25 seconds. The atmosphere is mystical and calm, with warm diffused light filtering through the tall arched windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic divination classroom that remains poised in mystical stillness as a single figure traverses the space. It begins with a wide perspective of the stone-walled room, where students sit in quiet contemplation on cushions around tables topped with glowing crystal balls. As the scene unfolds, a character dressed in light-colored robes enters from the left, moving steadily across the chamber through the warm, diffused light filtering from purple-draped arched windows. The camera maintains its steady gaze as the figure passes the seated students and the ornate tapestries, finally exiting toward the right side of the frame.
